'''Chor-cake''' was a type of [[Cake/Legends|cake]] produced on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vernet]]. [[Yuri Stonelaw]] fortified himself with a large stack of chor-cakes before infiltrating the [[Vernet Imperial Army Training Camp]] in an attempt to rescue his brother, [[Kristoff Stonelaw|Kristoff]], from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TD" />
